commentary: Arora to Marsh, FOUR runs | short, wide and punished!
Arora to Marsh, no run | back of a length just outside off. Marsh gets up on his toes and drops it into the off side
Arora to Marsh,  1 run | in-swinger, on a back of a length and finishing on off. Marsh tips it towards extra cover and hares across to the other end
Arora to Markram, no run | back of a length on middle and leg. Markram rises with the bounce and defends into the on side
Arora to Markram, no run | back of a length outside off. Nips in, kicks up a little and the ball pops off the splice into the off side
Arora to Markram,  1 run | back of a length, shaping into the pads. Markram punches it enough to mid on's right and keeps strike
Roy to Markram,  1 run | tossed up full on middle and off. Markram lunges forward and pushes it to long off
Roy to Marsh, no run | back of a length on middle and off. Holds a touch in the surface and Marsh prods it back to the bowler
Roy to Marsh, 1 wide | darted in on a length on leg but this continues further down with the angle. Good take by the keeper. Called a wide, though
Roy to Marsh,  1 run | on a length on leg. Not a lot of room to work with and Marsh pushes it towards long off
Roy to Markram,  1 run | back of a length on middle and leg. Markram waits on it before flicking it towards deep mid wicket
1lb | Roy to Marsh, 1 leg bye
Roy to Markram,  1 run | floated up full on off. Markram winds up and drills it towards long off
Roy to Markram, 1 wide | drifts down leg with a very full ball. Markram does not get bat on it and the umpire has to indulge in some more exercise
Saini to Markram, FOUR runs | just over!
Saini to Markram,  SIX runs | this is a shot and a half!
Saini to Markram, FOUR runs | this is a Markram special!
1lb | Saini to Markram, 1 leg bye
Saini to Marsh,  1 run | off-pace and into the track outside off. Marsh hops up onto his toes and taps it into the point region
Saini to Markram,  2 runs | another slower ball, on a length on the pads. Markram tucks it off his hips towards deep square leg
Roy to Marsh,  1 run | back of a length on off. Marsh hangs back and punches it to long off
Roy to Markram,  1 run | back of a length on middle and off, and this skids through low. Markram stabs it off the back foot towards deep mid wicket
Roy to Marsh,  1 run | loopy yorker outside off. Marsh jams down on it and digs it out towards long off
Roy to Markram, no run | flighted up full just outside off. Markram looks to hit it too hard and drags it towards square leg
Roy to Markram,  1 run | tossed up again, full on middle and leg. Markram stretches forward and knocks it to long off
Roy to Marsh,  SIX runs | Marsh goes big now!
Arora to Markram, OUT | miscued a mile up, and Powell does the rest! Arora lands KKR's first punch!
Arora to Pant,  1 run | back of a length on middle and leg. Pant gets on top of the bounce and turns it into the square leg region
Arora to Marsh, OUT | gloved through the keeper, and Arora is turning on the heat!
Arora to Badoni, no run | banged half-way down again and this tails a touch down leg. Badoni happy to duck under it
Arora to Badoni,  SIX runs | short ball nearly does the trick again!
Arora to Badoni,  1 run | short again, on middle and leg. Badoni gets inside the line and hooks it to fine leg
Narine to Badoni, no run | back of a length just outside off. Badoni sits deep in his crease and defends
Narine to Badoni,  1 run | back of a length just outside off. Badoni reads it off the pitch and knocks it to long on
Narine to Pant,  1 run | back of a length on middle and leg. Pant dinks it into the square leg region. Pant contemplates the second briefly before deciding against it
Narine to Badoni, FOUR runs | shot!
Narine to Badoni, no run | slower and fuller on off. Badoni lunges forward and plays down the wrong line. Pinged on the front pad but that spun too much
Narine to Badoni,  1 run | back of a length on off. Badoni goes back and tucks it towards mid wicket
Kartik Tyagi to Badoni, FOUR runs | that has flown to the fence!
Kartik Tyagi to Badoni,  1 run | shortish just outside off. Badoni rises with the bounce and drops it into the off side for a sharp single
Kartik Tyagi to Pant,  1 run | length ball on the pads. Pant presses forward and tucks it to deep square leg
Kartik Tyagi to Badoni,  1 run | length ball hung up wide outside off. Badoni scuffs it towards sweeper cover
Kartik Tyagi to Pant, FOUR runs | that is splendid!
Kartik Tyagi to Pant,  1 run | slower bumper on middle and off. Pant walks across, trying to help it over short fine but toe-ends it into the deep square leg region instead
Narine to Pant,  1 run | short outside off. Pant hops back and cuts it towards sweeper cover
Narine to Badoni, no run | fullish outside off. Badoni looks to go inside-out but shanks it back to the bowler instead
Narine to Badoni,  1 run | back of a length on middle and leg. Badoni works it to deep mid wicket
Narine to Pant,  1 run | length ball on the pads. Pant tucks it towards deep backward square leg
Narine to Badoni,  1 run | back of a length on middle and leg. Badoni reads it off the pitch and helps it behind square
Narine to Pant, no run | on a length on middle and off, and this spins away. Pant gets squared up and plonks it off the leading edge towards short third
Green to Badoni,  1 run | short outside off. Badoni rises with the bounce and cuts it towards deep point
Green to Pant, OUT | Pant miscues a pull, and KKR's million-dollar buy delivers with the ball straightaway!
Green to Pooran,  1 run | slower ball on a back of a length on middle and leg. Pooran drops it into the off side and opens his account
Green to Pooran, 1 wide | starts off with a bumper outside off. Sails a mile over Pooran and he would have needed a step-ladder to get to that. Don't think there will be any reviews on this wide!
Green to Badoni,  1 run | back of a length outside off. Badoni lifts up his front leg and short-arm-jabs it on the bounce to mid on
Green to Pooran,  SIX runs | Pooran is up and running!
Green to Pooran,  1 run | caught but it will not count!
1nb | Green to Pooran, (no ball)
Narine to Pooran, no run | how has that missed?!
Narine to Pooran, no run | Back of a length outside off. Pooran stays back and pats it into the off side
Narine to Pooran, no run | Another play and miss! This is fuller in and around off. Goes the other way now and beats Pooran on the outside as he prods at it
Narine to Pooran,  1 run | Length ball on the pads. Pooran lets the ball come to him before tucking it towards deep mid wicket
Narine to Badoni, no run | Back of a length outside off. Badoni gets squared up and prods it behind point
Narine to Badoni, no run | fired in full on middle and off. Badoni comes forward and blocks
Saini to Pooran, no run | slower ball on a full length outside off. Pooran comes forward and drives it straight to extra cover
Saini to Pooran, no run | off-pace and dug into the track outside off. Pooran has a wild swipe across the line and misses the ball by a mile
Saini to Pooran,  2 runs | another slower ball, hung up full and wide. Pooran reaches out for it and drills it towards long off, where Rahane tumbles to his right and saves two
Saini to Pooran, 1 wide | slower bumper outside leg and this balloons over the batter's head. Called a wide. Could have been a wide on both direction and height
Saini to Pooran, no run | another cutter, on a back of a length outside off. Pooran waits for it before dabbing it towards backward point
Saini to Pooran, no run | takes the pace off again, on a shortish length just outside off. Pooran has an ungainly mow at it and is too early into the stroke
Saini to Pooran,  2 runs | another change-up, on a back of a length outside off. Pooran jabs it towards sweeper cover and canters back for a brace
Kartik Tyagi to Badoni, no run | starts off with a short and wide delivery. Badoni swishes at it and misses. Called a wide
Kartik Tyagi to Badoni, FOUR runs | smartly done!
Kartik Tyagi to Badoni,  1 run | back of a length on middle and off. Badoni gets up on his toes and turns it towards deep mid wicket
Kartik Tyagi to Pooran, OUT | yet another LSG batter falls to the short ball!

Kartik Tyagi to Abdul Samad, no run | back of a length outside off and this whizzes through. Samad looks to drive on the up and sees the ball whistle past his flailing blade. That was bowled at 146kph!
Kartik Tyagi to Abdul Samad,  1 run | on a length outside off. Samad gets onto the front foot and pushes it towards sweeper cover
Roy to Abdul Samad,  1 run | fired in full on middle and off. Samad comes forward and knocks it to long on
Roy to Badoni, no run | length ball hidden wide outside off. Just inside the tramlines, though, meaning Badoni does not get the wide after letting it go
Roy to Badoni, FOUR runs | top shot!
Roy to Badoni,  1 run | safe!
Roy to Badoni, 1 wide | back of a length delivery wider outside off. Called a wide this time
Roy to Abdul Samad, OUT | through him, and Samad has to walk too!
Roy to Abdul Samad, 1 wide | short and wide again. Samad shoulders arms and the umpire signals for a wide again
Roy to Choudhary, no run | floated up full outside off. Mukul comes forward and drives it straight to extra cover
Saini to Badoni, FOUR runs | welcomed back with a boundary!
Saini to Badoni, FOUR runs | this is even better!
Saini to Badoni, no run | back of a length outside off. Badoni has a waft at it and under-edges it towards the keeper
Saini to Badoni,  2 runs | short and wide outside off. Badoni jumps up onto his toes and cuts it past backward point, who is a little guilty of diving over it. Back for a brace
Saini to Badoni, FOUR runs | stunning batting!
Saini to Badoni,  1 run | slower ball into the track just outside off. Badoni waits for it and tugs it on the bounce to deep mid wicket
Roy to Badoni, no run | back of a length on middle and off. Badoni hangs back and chunks it off the inside edge into his pads
Roy to Badoni, no run | full and wide outside off. Badoni backs away and drills it straight to extra cover
Roy to Badoni,  SIX runs | full toss and dumped beyond the ropes!
Roy to Badoni, OUT | chipped straight to long off, and is that the game?!
Roy to Shami,  1 run | back of a length on middle and off. Spins away and Shami, sitting deep in his crease, nudges it into the square leg region
Roy to Choudhary,  1 run | fired in on a length on off. Mukul hangs back and stabs it to long on to retain strike
Narine to Choudhary, no run | full just outside off. Nips away and Mukul, jabbing at it, squirts it off the outside edge towards short third
Narine to Choudhary, no run | back of a length outside off and this seams away. Mukul has no clue about it and gets beaten all ends up as he nibbles at it
Narine to Choudhary, no run | back of a length outside off. Mukul, caught on the crease, wafts at it and is beaten again
Narine to Choudhary,  1 run | this is the one that comes in. On a length just outside off and Mukul sweeps it towards deep backward square leg
Narine to Shami, no run | peach!
Narine to Shami, OUT | Shami slogs and Shami falls!
Arora to Choudhary, no run | half-tracker outside off. Mukul gets up on his toes and swats it towards deep backward square leg. Single denied
Arora to Choudhary, no run | zipped in very full on leg. Mukul looks to dig it out but is too late on the flick. Jammed on the boot
Arora to Choudhary, FOUR runs | finds the gap, eventually!
Arora to Choudhary,  SIX runs | oh, hello! Where has this come from?!
Arora to Choudhary,  1 run | juicy full toss outside off. Mukul sits deep in his crease and hoicks it on the bounce to deep mid wicket
Arora to Avesh Khan, no run | banged in short outside off. Avesh swings himself off his feet but gets nowhere close to the ball
Kartik Tyagi to Choudhary,  SIX runs | oh goodness gracious me - what is this hitting?!
Kartik Tyagi to Choudhary, no run | full toss outside off. Mukul powers it down the ground to long on, and opts not to take the single
Kartik Tyagi to Choudhary, no run | dug in short outside off. Mukul sits deep in his crease and hacks it to deep mid wicket
Kartik Tyagi to Choudhary,  SIX runs | this is a mighty hit! Into orbit!
Kartik Tyagi to Choudhary,  1 run | shortish outside off. Mukul opens up his stance and heaves it to deep mid wicket. Takes the single this time, since it is the fifth ball of the over
Kartik Tyagi to Avesh Khan, no run | back of a length delivery hung up wide outside off. Avesh swings like a rusty gate, and his bat ends up in a different postcode to the ball

Green to Choudhary, no run | oh, this has gone way up, and it lands into safety! Slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Mukul has a swish at it and mistimes it horribly. So much of a miscue that the ball lands right on the edge in the mid off region
Green to Choudhary, no run | slower bumper just outside off. Mukul has a wild swipe across the line and gets pinged near the right shoulder blade
Green to Choudhary,  SIX runs | flat six, and Mukul keeps LSG breathing!
Green to Choudhary, no run | nicked but well short!
Green to Choudhary, FOUR runs | off the top edge but guess what, they all count!
Green to Choudhary,  SIX runs | pick the bones out of this one! A crack off the bat, and LSG still believe!
Arora to Avesh Khan,  1 run | back of a length on middle and off. Avesh tucks it into the deep mid wicket region and brings Mukul back on strike
Arora to Choudhary,  SIX runs | bam! Mukul is having a ball out there at the Eden G, and KKR do not know what has hit them!

Arora to Choudhary, no run | brilliant yorker outside off, and the crowd finds its voice. Right under the bat. Mukul wanted to go downtown but not much he could do with that. Exemplary execution under immense pressure!
Arora to Choudhary, no run | well well! Arora winning this battle now!
Arora to Choudhary,  SIX runs | oh my good lord - what is this boy made of?! Hang that in the Louvre!

Arora to Choudhary, 1 bye | a missed swish, and a missed throw too! And the Super Giants have scraped through! Oh, what drama. Avesh does not have his helmet on but he does have his skates on, and good for LSG that he did!
